fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.system" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.system" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Canonische CodeSystem URL für ICD-10-GM" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The identification of the code system that defines the meaning of the symbol in the code." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The URI may be an OID (urn:oid:...) or a UUID (urn:uuid:...).  OIDs and UUIDs SHALL be references to the HL7 OID registry. Otherwise, the URI should come from HL7's list of FHIR defined special URIs or it should reference to some definition that establishes the system clearly and unambiguously." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be unambiguous about the source of the definition of the symbol." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.system" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "uri"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:uri         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:fixed [
a fhir:Uri ;
fhir:v "http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/icd-10-gm"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/icd-10-gm>       ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.3" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./codeSystem" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.system rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.codeSystem" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.version" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.version" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Die Jahresversion von ICD-10-GM. Angegeben wird immer die vierstellige Jahreszahl (z.B. \"2017\")" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Bie Verwendung von ICD-10-GM ist die Angabe der Version zwingend erforderlich.\r\nHierdurch wird der Tatsache Rechnung getragen, dass jede der jährlich neu erscheinenden Fassung von ICD-10-GM ein neues Codesystem darstellt." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Where the terminology does not clearly define what string should be used to identify code system versions, the recommendation is to use the date (expressed in FHIR date format) on which that version was officially published as the version date." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.version" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.7" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./codeSystemVersion" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.version rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.codeSystemVersion" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.code" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.code" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Der ICD-10-Code" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "In diesem Element wird der Code für die Diagnose angegeben, inklusive Anzeigename (Display Name) sowie Name und Version des Code-Systems, allerdings ohne ein Mehrfachcodierungskennzeichen (z. B. '*', '†' oder '!'). Diese sind in anderen entsprechenden Elementen abzubilden." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to refer to a particular code in the system." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.code" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:example [
fhir:label [ fhir:v "Einfacher ICD-Code" ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Code ;
fhir:v "F17.4"         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "icd-regex" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "warning" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "In code sind nur gültige ICD-10-Codes ohne Zusätze erlaubt" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "matches('^[A-Z][0-9][A-Z0-9](\\\\.?[A-Z0-9]{0,4})?$')" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://fhir.de/StructureDefinition/CodingICD10GM"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://fhir.de/StructureDefinition/CodingICD10GM>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.1" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./code" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.code rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.code" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.display" ] ;
      ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-translatable"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-translatable>         ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Boolean ;
fhir:v true         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Representation defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know  the system." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.display" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.2 - but note this is not well followed" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "CV.displayName" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.display rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.displayName" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:ICD-10-GM.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If this coding was chosen directly by the user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates that this coding was chosen by a user directly - e.g. off a pick list of available items (codes or displays)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Sometimes implied by being first" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "CD.codingRationale" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:mapsTo dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:hasMap fhir:Coding.userSelected.map. fhir:Coding.userSelected.map a fhir:Map;   fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected\\#true a [     fhir:source \"true\";     fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale\\#O   ]" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:alphaId" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "alphaId" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "A reference to a code defined by a terminology system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "In diesem Element wird der Code für die Diagnose angegeben, inklusive Anzeigename (Display Name) sowie Name und Version des Code-Systems." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Bei Alpha-ID-Codes, die zu postkoordinierten ICD-10-Codes gemappt werden, sollten diese nur einmal bei der Primärdiagnose und nicht mehr bei den Sekundärdiagnosen angeben werden (Stichpunkt: related Conditions in FHIR). In Fällen bei denen eine abweichende Diagnosesicherheit zwischen Primär- und Sekundärdiagnose vorhanden ist muss sichergestellt werden, dass die Diagnosesicherheit der Primärdiagnose zu dem assozierten Alpha-ID-Code passt. Siehe der Implementierungsguide (IG) der deutschen Basisprofile von HL7" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows for alternative encodings within a code system, and translations to other code systems." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CodeableConcept.coding" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "Coding"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Coding         ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://fhir.de/StructureDefinition/CodingAlphaID"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://fhir.de/StructureDefinition/CodingAlphaID>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:condition [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ) ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.system" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Canonische CodeSystem URL für Alpha-ID" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The identification of the code system that defines the meaning of the symbol in the code." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The URI may be an OID (urn:oid:...) or a UUID (urn:uuid:...).  OIDs and UUIDs SHALL be references to the HL7 OID registry. Otherwise, the URI should come from HL7's list of FHIR defined special URIs or it should reference to some definition that establishes the system clearly and unambiguously." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be unambiguous about the source of the definition of the symbol." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.system" ] ;

a fhir:Uri ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./codeSystem" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.system rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.codeSystem" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:alphaId.version" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.version" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Die Jahresversion von Alpha-ID. Angegeben wird immer die vierstellige Jahreszahl (z.B. \"2017\")" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Bie Verwendung von Alpha-ID ist die Angabe der Version zwingend erforderlich.\r\nHierdurch wird der Tatsache Rechnung getragen, dass jede der jährlich neu erscheinenden Fassung von Alpha-ID ein neues Codesystem darstellt." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Where the terminology does not clearly define what string should be used to identify code system versions, the recommendation is to use the date (expressed in FHIR date format) on which that version was officially published as the version date." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.version" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "./codeSystemVersion" ]       ] [

fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.version rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.codeSystemVersion" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:alphaId.code" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.code" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Der Alpha-ID-Code" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A symbol in syntax defined by the system. The symbol may be a predefined code or an expression in a syntax defined by the coding system (e.g. post-coordination)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to refer to a particular code in the system." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.code rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.code" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:value [
a fhir:Boolean ;
fhir:v true         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Representation defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that FHIR strings SHALL NOT exceed 1MB in size" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know  the system." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.2 - but note this is not well followed" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "CV.displayName" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.display rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.displayName" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:alphaId.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If this coding was chosen directly by the user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates that this coding was chosen by a user directly - e.g. off a pick list of available items (codes or displays)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.userSelected" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Sometimes implied by being first" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "CD.codingRationale" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:mapsTo dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:hasMap fhir:Coding.userSelected.map. fhir:Coding.userSelected.map a fhir:Map;   fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected\\#true a [     fhir:source \"true\";     fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale\\#O   ]" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:snomed" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "snomed" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Code defined by a terminology system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "In diesem Element wird der Code für die Diagnose als SNOMED CT®-Code Code angegeben, inklusive Anzeigename (Display Name) sowie Name und Version des Code-Systems." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information.  Ordering of codings is undefined and SHALL NOT be used to infer meaning. Generally, at most only one of the coding values will be labeled as UserSelected = true." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows for alternative encodings within a code system, and translations to other code systems." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CodeableConcept.coding" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;

fhir:l fhir:Coding         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:snomed.system" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.system" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Identity of the terminology system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The identification of the code system that defines the meaning of the symbol in the code." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The URI may be an OID (urn:oid:...) or a UUID (urn:uuid:...).  OIDs and UUIDs SHALL be references to the HL7 OID registry. Otherwise, the URI should come from HL7's list of FHIR defined special URIs or it should reference to some definition that establishes the system clearly and unambiguously." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be unambiguous about the source of the definition of the symbol." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.version" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Version of the system - if relevant" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The version of the code system which was used when choosing this code. Note that a well-maintained code system does not need the version reported, because the meaning of codes is consistent across versions. However this cannot consistently be assured, and when the meaning is not guaranteed to be consistent, the version SHOULD be exchanged." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Where the terminology does not clearly define what string should be used to identify code system versions, the recommendation is to use the date (expressed in FHIR date format) on which that version was officially published as the version date." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.version" ] ;

fhir:value [
a fhir:Boolean ;
fhir:v true         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Representation defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know  the system." ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:snomed.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If this coding was chosen directly by the user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates that this coding was chosen by a user directly - e.g. off a pick list of available items (codes or displays)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "Sometimes implied by being first" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "CD.codingRationale" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:mapsTo dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:hasMap fhir:Coding.userSelected.map. fhir:Coding.userSelected.map a fhir:Map;   fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected\\#true a [     fhir:source \"true\";     fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale\\#O   ]" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:orphanet" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "orphanet" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Code defined by a terminology system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "In diesem Element wird der Code für die Diagnose als Orphanet Code angegeben, inklusive Anzeigename (Display Name) sowie Name und Version des Code-Systems." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information.  Ordering of codings is undefined and SHALL NOT be used to infer meaning. Generally, at most only one of the coding values will be labeled as UserSelected = true." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows for alternative encodings within a code system, and translations to other code systems." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions. fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Representation defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know  the system." ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding:orphanet.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.code.coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If this coding was chosen directly by the user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates that this coding was chosen by a user directly - e.g. off a pick list of available items (codes or displays)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.userSelected" ] ;

fhir:code [

a fhir:Boolean ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Diagnoseerläuterung" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird ein Freitext eingetragen." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "The codes from the terminologies do not always capture the correct meaning with all the nuances of the human using them, or sometimes there is no appropriate code at all. In these cases, the text is used to capture the full meaning of the source." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Körperstelle" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Über die Körperstelle wird angegeben, in welchem Bereich des Körpers eine Krankheit diagnostiziert wurde (topographische Information)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Only used if not implicit in code found in Condition.code. If the use case requires attributes from the BodySite resource (e.g. to identify and track separately) then use the standard extension [bodySite](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-bodysite.html).  May be a summary code, or a reference to a very precise definition of the location, or both." ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information. fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Identity of the terminology system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The identification of the code system that defines the meaning of the symbol in the code." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The URI may be an OID (urn:oid:...) or a UUID (urn:uuid:...).  OIDs and UUIDs SHALL be references to the HL7 OID registry. Otherwise, the URI should come from HL7's list of FHIR defined special URIs or it should reference to some definition that establishes the system clearly and unambiguously." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be unambiguous about the source of the definition of the symbol." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.bodySite.coding.version" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Version of the system - if relevant" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The version of the code system which was used when choosing this code. Note that a well-maintained code system does not need the version reported, because the meaning of codes is consistent across versions. However this cannot consistently be assured, and when the meaning is not guaranteed to be consistent, the version SHOULD be exchanged." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Where the terminology does not clearly define what string should be used to identify code system versions, the recommendation is to use the date (expressed in FHIR date format) on which that version was officially published as the version date." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A symbol in syntax defined by the system. The symbol may be a predefined code or an expression in a syntax defined by the coding system (e.g. post-coordination)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to refer to a particular code in the system." ] ;

a fhir:Boolean ;
fhir:v true         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.bodySite.coding.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Representation defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know  the system." ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.bodySite.coding:snomed.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.bodySite.coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If this coding was chosen directly by the user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates that this coding was chosen by a user directly - e.g. off a pick list of available items (codes or displays)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:mapsTo dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:hasMap fhir:Coding.userSelected.map. fhir:Coding.userSelected.map a fhir:Map;   fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected\\#true a [     fhir:source \"true\";     fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale\\#O   ]" ]       ] )     ] [

a fhir:Boolean ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.bodySite.text" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Plain text representation of the concept" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A human language representation of the concept as seen/selected/uttered by the user who entered the data and/or which represents the intended meaning of the user." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "The codes from the terminologies do not always capture the correct meaning with all the nuances of the human using them, or sometimes there is no appropriate code at all. In these cases, the text is used to capture the full meaning of the source." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:rules [ fhir:v "open" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Additional content defined by implementations" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.subject.reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A reference to a location at which the other resource is found. The reference may be a relative reference, in which case it is relative to the service base URL, or an absolute URL that resolves to the location where the resource is found. The reference may be version specific or not. If the reference is not to a FHIR RESTful server, then it should be assumed to be version specific. Internal fragment references (start with '#') refer to contained resources." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Using absolute URLs provides a stable scalable approach suitable for a cloud/web context, while using relative/logical references provides a flexible approach suitable for use when trading across closed eco-system boundaries.   Absolute URLs do not need to point to a FHIR RESTful server, though this is the preferred approach. If the URL conforms to the structure \"/[type]/[id]\" then it should be assumed that the reference is to a FHIR RESTful server." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.subject.type" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Type the reference refers to (e.g. \"Patient\")" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The expected type of the target of the reference. If both Reference.type and Reference.reference are populated and Reference.reference is a FHIR URL, both SHALL be consistent.\n\nThe type is the Canonical URL of Resource Definition that is the type this reference refers to. References are URLs that are relative to http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ e.g. \"Patient\" is a reference to http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient. Absolute URLs are only allowed for logical models (and can only be used in references in logical models, not resources)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element is used to indicate the type of  the target of the reference. This may be used which ever of the other elements are populated (or not). In some cases, the type of the target may be determined by inspection of the reference (e.g. a RESTful URL) or by resolving the target of the reference; if both the type and a reference is provided, the reference SHALL resolve to a resource of the same type as that specified." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.type" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "uri"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:uri         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "FHIRResourceTypeExt"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "extensible" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model)." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/resource-types|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/resource-types?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.subject.identifier" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.subject.identifier" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Logical reference, when literal reference is not known" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An identifier for the target resource. This is used when there is no way to reference the other resource directly, either because the entity it represents is not available through a FHIR server, or because there is no way for the author of the resource to convert a known identifier to an actual location. There is no requirement that a Reference.identifier point to something that is actually exposed as a FHIR instance, but it SHALL point to a business concept that would be expected to be exposed as a FHIR instance, and that instance would need to be of a FHIR resource type allowed by the reference." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "When an identifier is provided in place of a reference, any system processing the reference will only be able to resolve the identifier to a reference if it understands the business context in which the identifier is used. Sometimes this is global (e.g. a national identifier) but often it is not. For this reason, none of the useful mechanisms described for working with references (e.g. chaining, includes) are possible, nor should servers be expected to be able resolve the reference. Servers may accept an identifier based reference untouched, resolve it, and/or reject it - see CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.referencePolicy. \n\nWhen both an identifier and a literal reference are provided, the literal reference is preferred. Applications processing the resource are allowed - but not required - to check that the identifier matches the literal reference\n\nApplications converting a logical reference to a literal reference may choose to leave the logical reference present, or remove it.\n\nReference is intended to point to a structure that can potentially be expressed as a FHIR resource, though there is no need for it to exist as an actual FHIR resource instance - except in as much as an application wishes to actual find the target of the reference. The content referred to be the identifier must meet the logical constraints implied by any limitations on what resource types are permitted for the reference.  For example, it would not be legitimate to send the identifier for a drug prescription if the type were Reference(Observation|DiagnosticReport).  One of the use-cases for Reference.identifier is the situation where no FHIR representation exists (where the type is Reference (Any)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.identifier" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "Identifier"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Identifier         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".identifier" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:value [
a fhir:Boolean ;
fhir:v true         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.subject.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Text alternative for the resource" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Plain text narrative that identifies the resource in addition to the resource reference." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This is generally not the same as the Resource.text of the referenced resource.  The purpose is to identify what's being referenced, not to fully describe it." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.display" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.encounter" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.encounter" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Encounter created as part of" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The Encounter during which this Condition was created or to which the creation of this record is tightly associated." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This will typically be the encounter the event occurred within, but some activities may be initiated prior to or after the official completion of an encounter but still be tied to the context of the encounter. This record indicates the encounter this particular record is associated with.  In the case of a \"new\" diagnosis reflecting ongoing/revised information about the condition, this might be distinct from the first encounter in which the underlying condition was first \"known\"." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.encounter" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "$this" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:ordered [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "closed" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Klinisch relevanter Zeitraum Anfang" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Über den klinisch relevanten Zeitraum wird angezeigt, in welchem Zeitraum bzw. seit wann der/die Patient:in die Diagnose/Erkrankung hatte bzw. hat. Es wird ausgedrückt, seit wann ein/e Patient:in an einer Erkrankung leidet bzw. eine Diagnose hat, indem nur das Startdatum des Zeitraums angegeben wird. Das Startdatum des Zeitraums kann vom Diagnosedatum abweichen. Datumsangaben zu Diagnosen können in unterschiedlicher Präzision vorhanden sein." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Age is generally used when the patient reports an age at which the Condition began to occur." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [

fhir:l fhir:Period         ]       ] [
fhir:code [

fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "onsetPeriod" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird das Zeintintervall angegeben, ab wann der Patient die Diagnose hatte bzw. unter der Erkrankung leidet/litt." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Age is generally used when the patient reports an age at which the Condition began to occur." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]" ] ;

To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "extensions" ] [ fhir:v "user content" ] ) ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird Datum/Zeit für den Beginn der Zeitspanne angegeben." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If the low element is missing, the meaning is that the low boundary is not known." ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "End time with inclusive boundary, if not ongoing" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird Datum/Zeit für das Ende der Zeitspanne angegeben." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The high value includes any matching date/time. i.e. 2012-02-03T10:00:00 is in a period that has an end value of 2012-02-03." ] ;

fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "onsetRange" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Lebensphase-von" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier erfolgt die Angabe der Altersspanne, seit dem der/die Patient:in die Diagnose hat (unter der Erkrankung leidet)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Age is generally used when the patient reports an age at which the Condition began to occur." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-fhir-type"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-fhir-type>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Url ;
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:code [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhirpath/System.String"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhirpath/System.String>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.extension:lebensphase-von.value[x].coding.extension" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].extension.value[x].coding.extension" ] ;
fhir:slicing [
        ( fhir:discriminator [
fhir:type [ fhir:v "value" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "url" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url" ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "open" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Additional content defined by implementations" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "extensions" ] [ fhir:v "user content" ] ) ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Extension         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.extension:lebensphase-von.value[x].coding.system" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].extension.value[x].coding.system" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Identity of the terminology system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The identification of the code system that defines the meaning of the symbol in the code." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The URI may be an OID (urn:oid:...) or a UUID (urn:uuid:...).  OIDs and UUIDs SHALL be references to the HL7 OID registry. Otherwise, the URI should come from HL7's list of FHIR defined special URIs or it should reference to some definition that establishes the system clearly and unambiguously." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be unambiguous about the source of the definition of the symbol." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.system" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "uri"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:uri         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.3" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./codeSystem" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.system rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.codeSystem" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.extension:lebensphase-von.value[x].coding.version" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].extension.value[x].coding.version" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Version of the system - if relevant" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The version of the code system which was used when choosing this code. Note that a well-maintained code system does not need the version reported, because the meaning of codes is consistent across versions. However this cannot consistently be assured, and when the meaning is not guaranteed to be consistent, the version SHOULD be exchanged." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Where the terminology does not clearly define what string should be used to identify code system versions, the recommendation is to use the date (expressed in FHIR date format) on which that version was officially published as the version date." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.version" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.7" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./codeSystemVersion" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.version rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.codeSystemVersion" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.extension:lebensphase-von.value[x].coding.code" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].extension.value[x].coding.code" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Symbol in syntax defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A symbol in syntax defined by the system. The symbol may be a predefined code or an expression in a syntax defined by the coding system (e.g. post-coordination)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to refer to a particular code in the system." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.code" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.1" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "./code" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.code rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.code" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.extension:lebensphase-von.value[x].coding.display" ] ;
      ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-translatable"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-translatable>         ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Boolean ;
fhir:v true         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].extension.value[x].coding.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Representation defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that FHIR strings SHALL NOT exceed 1MB in size" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know  the system." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [

fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.2 - but note this is not well followed" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "CV.displayName" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.display rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.displayName" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.extension:lebensphase-von.value[x].coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].extension.value[x].coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If this coding was chosen directly by the user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates that this coding was chosen by a user directly - e.g. off a pick list of available items (codes or displays)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Sometimes implied by being first" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "CD.codingRationale" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "orim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:mapsTo dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:hasMap fhir:Coding.userSelected.map. fhir:Coding.userSelected.map a fhir:Map;   fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected\\#true a [     fhir:source \"true\";     fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale\\#O   ]" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetRange.extension:lebensphase-von.value[x].text" ] ;
      ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-translatable"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-translatable>         ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Boolean ;
fhir:v true         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].extension.value[x].text" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Plain text representation of the concept" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A human language representation of the concept as seen/selected/uttered by the user who entered the data and/or which represents the intended meaning of the user." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "The codes from the terminologies do not always capture the correct meaning with all the nuances of the human using them, or sometimes there is no appropriate code at all. In these cases, the text is used to capture the full meaning of the source." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CodeableConcept.text" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.9. But note many systems use C*E.2 for this" ]       ] [

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "extensions" ] [ fhir:v "user content" ] ) ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency.  The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system." ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Age is generally used when the patient reports an age at which the Condition began to occur." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Numerical value (with implicit precision)" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier erfolgt die Angabe des Wertes des Alters, seit dem der/die Patient:in die Diagnose hat (unter der Erkrankung leidet)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Precision is handled implicitly in almost all cases of measurement." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x].comparator" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "< | <= | >= | > - how to understand the value" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "How the value should be understood and represented - whether the actual value is greater or less than the stated value due to measurement issues; e.g. if the comparator is \"<\" , then the real value is < stated value." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need a framework for handling measures where the value is <5ug/L or >400mg/L due to the limitations of measuring methodology." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

a fhir:String ;

a fhir:Boolean ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier erfolgt die Angabe der Einheit des Alters, seit dem der/die Patient:in die Diagnose hat (unter der Erkrankung leidet)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "There are many representations for units of measure and in many contexts, particular representations are fixed and required. I.e. mcg for micrograms." ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]:onsetString" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "onsetString" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Klinisch relevanter Zeitraum Anfang" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Über den klinisch relevanten Zeitraum wird angezeigt, in welchem Zeitraum bzw. seit wann der/die Patient:in die Diagnose/Erkrankung hatte bzw. hat. Es wird ausgedrückt, seit wann ein/e Patient:in an einer Erkrankung leidet bzw. eine Diagnose hat, indem nur das Startdatum des Zeitraums angegeben wird. Das Startdatum des Zeitraums kann vom Diagnosedatum abweichen. Datumsangaben zu Diagnosen können in unterschiedlicher Präzision vorhanden sein." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Age is generally used when the patient reports an age at which the Condition began to occur." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.onset[x]" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Event.occurrence[x]" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "w5" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "FiveWs.init" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "PRB-16" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".effectiveTime.low or .inboundRelationship[typeCode=SUBJ].source[classCode=OBS, moodCode=EVN, code=\"age at onset\"].value" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x]" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x]" ] ;
fhir:slicing [
        ( fhir:discriminator [
fhir:type [ fhir:v "type" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "$this" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:ordered [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "closed" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Klinischer Zeitraum Ende" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird angegeben, bis wann der/die Patient:in die Diagnose/Erkrankung hatte. Bei einer fortbestehenden Diagnose/Erkrankung ist diese Angabe nicht zu übermitteln." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There is no explicit distinction between resolution and remission because in many cases the distinction is not clear. Age is generally used when the patient reports an age at which the Condition abated.  If there is no abatement element, it is unknown whether the condition has resolved or entered remission; applications and users should generally assume that the condition is still valid.  When abatementString exists, it implies the condition is abated." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x]" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "dateTime"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:dateTime         ]       ] [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "Age"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Age         ]       ] [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "Period"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Period         ]       ] [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "Range"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Range         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x]:abatementPeriod" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x]" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "abatementPeriod" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "When in resolution/remission" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird das Zeitintervall angegeben, bis zu dem der/die Patient:in unter der Erkrankung litt bzw. bis wann der/die Patient:in die Diagnose hatte." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There is no explicit distinction between resolution and remission because in many cases the distinction is not clear. Age is generally used when the patient reports an age at which the Condition abated.  If there is no abatement element, it is unknown whether the condition has resolved or entered remission; applications and users should generally assume that the condition is still valid.  When abatementString exists, it implies the condition is abated." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x]" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird Datum/Zeit für den Beginn der Zeitspanne angegeben." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird Datum/Zeit für das Ende der Zeitspanne angegeben." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The high value includes any matching date/time. i.e. 2012-02-03T10:00:00 is in a period that has an end value of 2012-02-03." ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information.  Ordering of codings is undefined and SHALL NOT be used to infer meaning. Generally, at most only one of the coding values will be labeled as UserSelected = true." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows for alternative encodings within a code system, and translations to other code systems." ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The URI may be an OID (urn:oid:...) or a UUID (urn:uuid:...).  OIDs and UUIDs SHALL be references to the HL7 OID registry. Otherwise, the URI should come from HL7's list of FHIR defined special URIs or it should reference to some definition that establishes the system clearly and unambiguously." ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:Coding.system rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CDCoding.codeSystem" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x].extension.value[x].coding.version" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Version of the system - if relevant" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The version of the code system which was used when choosing this code. Note that a well-maintained code system does not need the version reported, because the meaning of codes is consistent across versions. However this cannot consistently be assured, and when the meaning is not guaranteed to be consistent, the version SHOULD be exchanged." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Where the terminology does not clearly define what string should be used to identify code system versions, the recommendation is to use the date (expressed in FHIR date format) on which that version was officially published as the version date." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Symbol in syntax defined by the system" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A symbol in syntax defined by the system. The symbol may be a predefined code or an expression in a syntax defined by the coding system (e.g. post-coordination)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to refer to a particular code in the system." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that FHIR strings SHALL NOT exceed 1MB in size" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know  the system." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "C*E.2 - but note this is not well followed" ]       ] [

fhir:map [ fhir:v "CV.displayName" ]       ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x].extension.value[x].coding.userSelected" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If this coding was chosen directly by the user" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates that this coding was chosen by a user directly - e.g. off a pick list of available items (codes or displays)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Plain text representation of the concept" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A human language representation of the concept as seen/selected/uttered by the user who entered the data and/or which represents the intended meaning of the user." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "The codes from the terminologies do not always capture the correct meaning with all the nuances of the human using them, or sometimes there is no appropriate code at all. In these cases, the text is used to capture the full meaning of the source." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If the low element is missing, the low boundary is not known." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:rules [ fhir:v "open" ]       ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "extensions" ] [ fhir:v "user content" ] ) ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x].low.value" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Numerical value (with implicit precision)" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird der Wert für die Eintragung des Beginn der Altersspanne für die Schätzung des Alters angegeben." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Precision is handled implicitly in almost all cases of measurement." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "SN.2  / CQ - N/A" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "PQ.value, CO.value, MO.value, IVL.high or IVL.low depending on the value" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x]:abatementRange.low.comparator" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x].low.comparator" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "< | <= | >= | > - how to understand the value" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Not allowed to be used in this context" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need a framework for handling measures where the value is <5ug/L or >400mg/L due to the limitations of measuring methodology." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "If there is no comparator, then there is no modification of the value" ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "This is labeled as \"Is Modifier\" because the comparator modifies the interpretation of the value significantly. If there is no comparator, then there is no modification of the value" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;

a fhir:String ;

fhir:description [ fhir:v "How the Quantity should be understood and represented." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/quantity-comparator|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/quantity-comparator?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Unit representation" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird die Einheit für die Eintragung des Beginn der Altersspanne für die Schätzung des Alters angegeben." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "There are many representations for units of measure and in many contexts, particular representations are fixed and required. I.e. mcg for micrograms." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v true ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "PQ.unit" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x].low.system" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The identification of the system that provides the coded form of the unit." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to know the system that defines the coded form of the unit." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A computer processable form of the unit in some unit representation system." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency.  The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need a computable form of the unit that is fixed across all forms. UCUM provides this for quantities, but SNOMED CT provides many units of interest." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird das Ende der Altersspanne für die Schätzung des Alters angegeben." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If the high element is missing, the high boundary is not known." ] ;

To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions. fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Hier wird der Wert für die Eintragung des Endes der Altersspanne für die Schätzung des Alters angegeben." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books)." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Precision is handled implicitly in almost all cases of measurement." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Condition.abatement[x].high.comparator" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Not allowed to be used in this context" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need a framework for handling measures where the value is <5ug/L or >400mg/L due to the limitations of measuring methodology." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;

fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "This is labeled as \"Is Modifier\" because the comparator modifies the interpretation of the value significantly. If there is no comparator, then there is no modification of the value" ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "There are many representations for units of measure and in many contexts, particular representations are fixed and required. I.e. mcg for micrograms." ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Need to know the system that defines the coded form of the unit." ] ;
